text.value:
I have found multiple README files in the Azure REST API specifications repository. These files are often associated with specific tools or resource specifications. If you are looking for a general overview of these READMEs, I can focus on a specific one of your choosing. Here are a few examples for consideration:

1. [eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/eng/tools/lint-diff/README.md): A README for a tool used for linting differences in API specifications.

2. [specification/app/data-plane/readme.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/specification/app/data-plane/readme.md): Likely documentation related to app data plane specifications.

3. [specification/billing/resource-manager/readme.cli.md](https://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/ad2d848416d5b898870a6855790e92057c0f2d2d/specification/billing/resource-manager/readme.cli.md): CLI-specific information related to billing resource manager.

Please let me know if there are any specific READMEs you would like more information about, or if you have other specific tasks or topics you need assistance with!
Please summarize the Azure REST API specifications Readme
